mainEntity.name: Step-by-step to implement LLM metadata for Austin lawyers?
mainEntity.text: Step-by-step to implement LLM metadata for Austin lawyers?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Add RDFa to pages. 2. Tag expertise signals. 3. Test in ChatGPT. 4. Monitor citations.

suggestedAnswer.text: Austin: Embed TX Bar data in metadata. Increases LLM trust 25%. Tools: Schema.org generator. Quarterly refresh for algorithms.
